feed.title: Post-Quantum BIP-86 Recovery via zk-STARK Proof of BIP-32 Seed Knowledge

entry.title: Post-Quantum BIP-86 Recovery via zk-STARK Proof of BIP-32 Seed Knowledge
entry.summary: Laolu's original benchmarks in cryptographic operations were notably inefficient, with verification times around 2 seconds and proving times approaching a minute. Following collaborative input from Luke and myself, significant improvements were made to the benchmarks. The adjusted benchmarks now boast drastically reduced verification times, measured in milliseconds, and proving times that have been shortened to just a few seconds. Further enhancements are anticipated if a custom circuit replaces the current method of using an arithmetizing virtual machine. For more details on these developments, visit the discussion thread at [Bitcoin Development Mailing List](https://groups.google.com/g/bitcoindev/c/Q06piCEJhkI/m/5QOIiIozAgAJ). These advancements represent a substantial step forward in the efficiency of cryptographic proof systems, underscoring the importance of collaborative efforts in technological innovation within digital currency frameworks.
